recommended_overlap_notes: ACT1 placebo-controlled infliximab UC substudy with 48 patients and 113 biopsy arrays across baseline, week 8, and week 30. GSE12251 baseline ACT1 patient/timepoint labels are contained within this broader ACT1 series, so count DS106 as the primary ACT1 dataset row.

overlap_call: confirmed overlap with DS106; baseline ACT1 subset
recommended_overlap_notes: Baseline pre-infliximab ACT1 subset: GEO lists 22 ACT1 patients and 23 baseline arrays with patient IDs matching ACT1 baseline samples in GSE23597, including duplicate P13 baseline arrays. Retain only as linked/component row if needed; do not count independently from DS106.

overlap_call: distinct Leuven cohort; same Gut 2009 publication family as DS062
recommended_overlap_notes: Independent Leuven/KULeuven cohort from the Gut 2009 infliximab-response study: 24 active UC patients refractory to corticosteroids and/or immunosuppression plus 6 controls, with pre-treatment biopsies before first infliximab infusion. Same publication family as DS062 but not ACT1; no evidence of subject/sample overlap with DS106.
